description: Cross-language canonicalization test vectors for Sanna Protocol v1.2

vectors.description: CJK Unified Ideograph Extension B first
é vs e vs f (UTF-8 byte order)
Omega upper vs lower vs a
Z vs a (uppercase Z < lowercase a in UTF-8)
null present vs absent produces different canonical JSON
empty array [] hashes differently from EMPTY_HASH (null/absent)
EMPTY_HASH is SHA-256 of zero bytes

objects in array with unsorted keys
objects in array don't sort by content

checks array: insertion order preserved, keys sorted within each check
reordered checks array produces different hash
vectors.note: different from original order above — checks MUST be hashed in insertion order

vectors.description: hash_text: trailing whitespace per line stripped
minimal receipt: all optional hashes are EMPTY_HASH
receipt with both parent_receipts and workflow_id
empty array parent_receipts vs null produces different fingerprints

vectors.note: constitution_approval excluded from fingerprint but included in signature

vectors.description: receipt_fingerprint is first 16 chars of full_fingerprint
